_comment: App↔docs link contract. Maps stable topic keys to documentation paths (locale-relative) and, eventually, to the matching deep-link in the Grubano app. The full doc URL is `${base}/${locale}${doc}` (e.g. https://docs.grubano.com/fr/guides/pro/). The `app` field is null today and will be filled in once the corresponding routes are verified on the app side — do not invent deep links. Doc paths listed here are the public, frozen URLs: do not rename them without bumping `version`. Source of truth lives in this file (https://docs.grubano.com/docs-map.json) — consumers should fetch it at build time or at runtime with a cache.
